summary: Tested Modifier Groups CRUD functionality (EDIT/DELETE). All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed: Edit (pencil) and Delete (trash) buttons visible next to modifier group dropdown in ProductConfig dialog. PUT /api/modifier-groups/{gid} renames groups successfully. DELETE /api/modifier-groups/{gid} deletes groups and cascades to associated modifiers. Create New Group link works.

issues: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (a11y warning - minor)

critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/modifier-groups/{gid} endpoint (config.py lines 302-306) correctly updates group name and selection limits
DELETE /api/modifier-groups/{gid} endpoint (config.py lines 308-312) correctly deletes group and cascades to modifiers
Frontend ProductConfig.js (lines 1150-1194) has inline handlers for rename (window.prompt) and delete (window.confirm)
data-testid attributes properly set: rename-group-btn, delete-group-btn, create-new-group-btn
API response format uses {ok: true} for mutations - consistent with app patterns
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test modifier groups during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Modifier group CRUD fully tested. Existing groups: Temperatura, SIN, SALSAS (new-style in modifier_groups collection), plus Punto de Coccion, Extras, Acompanantes, Sin... (old-style in modifiers collection). HAMBURGUESA product has Temperatura assigned. Navigation path: Login (PIN 10000) -> Settings -> Configuración Productos -> Productos subtab -> click pencil icon on HAMBURGUESA -> Asignar Modificadores tab -> click Agregar button.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/modifier-groups: PASS - Returns new-style groups (Temperatura, SIN, SALSAS)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/modifier-groups-with-options: PASS - Returns all groups with enriched options
backend_endpoints.POST /api/modifier-groups: PASS - Creates new group with name, min/max_selection
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/modifier-groups/{gid}: PASS - Renames group and updates selection limits
backend_endpoints.DELETE /api/modifier-groups/{gid}: PASS - Deletes group and cascades to associated modifiers

frontend_ui.Edit (pencil) button: PASS - Triggers window.prompt('Nuevo nombre del grupo:')
frontend_ui.Delete (trash) button: PASS - Triggers window.confirm('Eliminar grupo... y todas sus opciones?')
frontend_ui.Create New Group link: PASS - Visible and triggers prompt for new group name
frontend_ui.Modifier group dropdown: PASS - Shows all groups with option counts
frontend_ui.Options list: PASS - Shows editable options with name and price
